violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets on the large milk cooler were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the share fridge have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/24/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC is scheduled to take exam on 10/2/25. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
PIC stated there is inadequate dry storage. PIC stated the area on the stage, which has school office supplies, was designated for kitchen storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The cold-hold units were observed not maintaining temperature of 41 degrees F or colder. Foods requiring refrigeration were brought to other units until time for service. Ice packs to be used in unit until unit is repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

Adequate hot water was not available in the building. Water temperature at the sink faucet was 64 degrees. Maintenance staff informed PIC that they adjusted the temperature at the water tank to 130 degrees F during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025
At the time of this inspection, facility is lacking adequate shelving for dry storage (can goods, etc). New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the: 1.under dishwasher 2.behind refrigeration unit 3.on shelves under hot hold counter The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2023
